requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 safety baseline where accepted under SONCAP/NIS/approved-equivalent route
requirement_topic.zh: 在SONCAP/NIS/认可等效路径下被接受时的IEC 61851安全基线
requirement_topic.zht: 在SONCAP/NIS/認可等效路徑下被接受時的IEC 61851安全基線

summary.en: SON identifies electrotechnical standardization work and SONCAP accepts applicable NIS or approved equivalents, including IEC standards where accepted in the conformity route. IEC 61851-1:2017 covers EV supply equipment characteristics, the EV-to-EVSE connection, and electrical safety requirements for EV supply equipment up to stated AC and DC voltage limits. The exact Nigerian Industrial Standard adoption record should be verified with SON for the model and use case.
summary.zh: SON列明其电工技术标准化工作，且SONCAP接受适用NIS或认可等效标准，包括在符合性路径中被接受的IEC标准。IEC 61851-1:2017覆盖电动汽车供电设备特性、EV与EVSE连接以及在规定交流和直流电压限值内EVSE的电气安全要求。具体尼日利亚工业标准采纳记录应按型号和用途向SON核实。
summary.zht: SON列明其電工技術標準化工作，且SONCAP接受適用NIS或認可等效標準，包括在符合性路徑中被接受的IEC標準。IEC 61851-1:2017覆蓋電動汽車供電設備特性、EV與EVSE連接以及在規定交流和直流電壓限值內EVSE的電氣安全要求。具體奈及利亞工業標準採納記錄應按型號和用途向SON核實。

standards_or_laws: Applicable NIS or approved IEC equivalent accepted under SONCAP
SON Electrotechnical Technical Committee standards activity

summary.en: China's GB-standard baseline for conductive charging safety is GB/T 18487.1-2023, used with related GB/T 18487 parts and GB/T 20234 connection-device standards. A GB/T 18487 report should be mapped clause-by-clause to IEC 61851 / NIS expectations before it is submitted for Nigeria.
summary.zh: 中国传导充电安全的GB标准基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并与相关GB/T 18487部分及GB/T 20234连接装置标准配套使用。向尼日利亚提交前，应将GB/T 18487报告逐条映射到IEC 61851/NIS要求。
summary.zht: 中國傳導充電安全的GB標準基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並與相關GB/T 18487部分及GB/T 20234連接裝置標準配套使用。向奈及利亞提交前，應將GB/T 18487報告逐條映射到IEC 61851/NIS要求。

gap.en: The technical gap is a standards-mapping package: ratings, modes, protective earthing, control pilot behavior, residual-current protection assumptions, markings, installation instructions, environmental ratings, and abnormal-condition tests should be mapped from the Chinese GB file to IEC 61851 / accepted NIS clauses.
gap.zh: 技术差距在于标准映射资料包：额定值、充电模式、保护接地、控制导引行为、剩余电流保护假设、标识、安装说明、环境等级和异常条件试验，应从中国GB文件映射到IEC 61851/被接受NIS条款。
gap.zht: 技術差距在於標準映射資料包：額定值、充電模式、保護接地、控制導引行為、剩餘電流保護假設、標識、安裝說明、環境等級和異常條件試驗，應從中國GB文件映射到IEC 61851/被接受NIS條款。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory when required by SONCAP route, applicable NIS, procurement specification, or installation approval; exact Nigerian adoption and scope must be confirmed with SON
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 is the China GB-standard safety baseline but does not automatically prove IEC 61851 or NIS conformity

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 18487 evidence should be treated as a starting point, not a substitute for IEC 61851 / NIS review under the Nigerian conformity route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 18487证据应作为起点，而不是替代尼日利亚符合性路径下的IEC 61851/NIS审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 18487證據應作為起點，而不是替代奈及利亞符合性路徑下的IEC 61851/NIS審查。
